mapper.sql: id, user_id, question_id, course_id, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO edu_question_favorite (user_id, question_id, course_id, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{courseId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_question_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND question_id = #{questionId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edu_question_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND deleted = 0
